Done. Here's what was found and fixed:

**Root cause:** Clunger serves all business logic via ConnectRPC (protobuf binary protocol) at paths like `/task.v1.TaskService/ListTasks`, but the frontend HTML (index.html, tasks.html, congress.html, etc.) makes plain REST/JSON calls to `/api/tasks`, `/api/agents`, `/api/congress/*`, etc. Those paths had no handlers in clunger, falling through to the static file serving and returning 404.
